calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2014 Continued To Apr-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Allow Entry Of Judgment Against Pasta Moto, Inc. Only While Retaining Right To A Further Judgment Against Michael Pirraglia
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF ITALFOODS INC.'S Motion To Allow Entry Of Judgment Against Pasta Moto, Inc. Only While Retaining Right To A Further Judgment Against Michael Pirraglia is granted. No opposition filed. The Court modified and signed the proposed order submitted by email. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
